# Cloudsheer Consulting

> Salesforce & Agentforce consulting partner helping mid-market and enterprise businesses cut costs, close more deals, and scale operations with Agentforce.

## About
Cloudsheer Consulting is a certified Salesforce partner specializing in Agentforce (autonomous AI agents), Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Marketing Cloud, Commerce Cloud, Experience Cloud, Analytics/Tableau, Platform, Slack, and Health Cloud. We have 40+ team members across Dallas, Delhi, London, and New York with 60+ Salesforce certifications and a 100% project success rate across 250+ engagements.

## Website
Canonical URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com

## Services
We offer four engagement types tailored to where you are in your Salesforce journey.

### Greenfield Implementation
New Salesforce deployments from scratch. Full org design, Sales/Service/Marketing Cloud configuration, data migration, Agentforce agents built in from day one. Go live in 4-8 weeks.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/services#greenfield

### Brownfield Implementation
Optimization and modernization of existing Salesforce orgs. Health check, technical debt cleanup, process re-engineering, and Agentforce layered onto your current setup. Zero-disruption phased rollout.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/services#brownfield

### Integration Services
API-led connectivity between Salesforce and your ERP, marketing tools, payment systems, and data warehouses. MuleSoft, native APIs, Data Cloud ingestion, SSO, and custom middleware.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/services#integration

### Managed Services
Dedicated ongoing Salesforce and Agentforce support on retainer. Admin/developer capacity, agent monitoring, release management, new feature development, and monthly health reports.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/services#managed

## Solutions

### Agentforce
Autonomous AI agents that handle support, sales, and operations 24/7 inside Salesforce. Typical results: 40% case resolution increase, 73% queries handled autonomously, $2 cost per conversation vs $11+ human agent.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/agentforce

### Sales Cloud
AI-powered CRM for pipeline management, lead qualification, forecasting, and CPQ. Typical results: 29% more revenue, 44% higher win rates, 5x ROI over 3 years.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/sales-cloud

### Service Cloud
Customer support platform with omni-channel routing, AI-powered self-service, and field service. Typical results: 30% faster resolution, 27% lower costs, 32% first-contact resolution.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/service-cloud

### Marketing Cloud
Personalized customer journeys across email, SMS, and advertising. Typical results: $36:$1 email ROI, 25% marketing ROI increase, 41% higher CTR with Einstein AI.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/marketing-cloud

### Commerce Cloud
Unified B2B and B2C commerce platform. Typical results: 29% conversion lift, 25% AOV increase, 68% faster time-to-market.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/commerce-cloud

### Experience Cloud
Customer and partner portals, self-service communities. Typical results: 48% ticket deflection, 3.4x ROI, 50% lower onboarding costs.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/experience-cloud

### Analytics / Tableau
CRM Analytics and Tableau for real-time dashboards and AI predictions. Typical results: 382% ROI, 28% better forecasts, 65% faster reporting.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/analytics

### Platform & AppExchange
Custom app development, Flow Builder automation, integrations. Typical results: 478% ROI, 70% faster delivery, 80% less code.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/platform

### Slack
AI-powered work OS connected to Salesforce CRM. Typical results: 47% productivity increase, 29% fewer meetings, 32% fewer emails.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/slack

### Health Cloud
Patient 360, care coordination, and engagement for healthcare and life sciences. HIPAA compliant. Typical results: 30% patient satisfaction improvement, 25% admin cost reduction, 40% faster coordination.
URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/solutions/health-cloud

## Process
1. Discovery - Identify highest-impact use case based on your data
2. Design - Custom agents designed around your workflows and Salesforce org
3. Build & Validate - Rigorous sandbox testing before production
4. Go Live & Measure - Launch with KPI tracking from day one

URL: https://www.cloudsheer.com/careers
